name: agent-memory-content-corruption
description: Prevents agent long-term memory from being degraded by session-scoped references, low-confidence LLM extractions, and cross-agent or cross-user contamination. TRIGGER when: building persistent memory for a multi-turn agent, memory retrieved in future sessions contains stale or invalid references, agent performance degrades as memory grows, deploying an agent in a multi-user or multi-agent environment.
author: Bytedance Inc
